experiments.source_title: The Great Awakening of Human Consciousness

core_result: The contrast source deforms the geometry inward.
interpretation: When the source type changes, the map changes: the mystical-symbolic source carries outward speculative mass plus developmental motion, while the conventional review source forms an inward caution/support cluster plus a limited-evidence band.
next_test: Add a third source with intervention-level data to test whether the map predicts claim bands before full extraction.
